title: Lab 26: Default ACL Shared Directory
description: Use a default ACL for a named user without creating an unnecessary home directory.

tasks: Create the group collab26 and the user probe26 without a home directory. Set the password of probe26 to cinder9.
Create the directory /shared/collab26 with owner root, group collab26, and permissions 2770.
Configure a default ACL so that user probe26 receives rwx permissions on new files and directories created under /shared/collab26.
hints: probe26 does not need a home directory for this task.
Default ACL entries begin with default:.
checks: getent group collab26 >/dev/null && getent passwd probe26 >/dev/null && ! test -d /home/probe26
solution_outline: Create the group and the no-home user.
Create the shared directory with the requested ownership and mode.
Apply a default ACL for probe26.
task_titles: Create the collab26 group and probe26 user
Create the shared directory with setgid semantics
Create the default ACL for probe26
